# Brillix Technologies

> Brillix Technologies builds modern web platforms, scalable SaaS products, AI solutions, and enterprise digital systems from Thrissur, Kerala.

## About

Brillix Technologies is a forward-thinking technology company focused on building scalable software systems, AI powered solutions, modern SaaS platforms, and high-performance web applications. We combine cutting-edge technology with deep industry expertise to deliver solutions that transform businesses.

## Services

- Web Application Development
- SaaS Platform Development
- AI & Automation Systems
- API Development
- Cloud Infrastructure
- UI / UX Design

## Technologies

Laravel, Angular, Node.js, Python, Docker, AWS, MySQL, Redis
